alkylation reagent: alkylated with 100 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min at room temperature in the dark
cleavage agent: the in-gel digestion of the proteins overnight at 37 °C with a solution of modified trypsin
enrichment method: we performed a tandem affinity purification
fractionation method: a physical separation step on a 10%–30% sucrose gradient
labeling: Label-free quantification of the relative abundances of the identified proteins
